cards.prompt: WhenAll returns all results in argument order
cards.code: using System; using System.Linq; using System.Threading.Tasks; async Task<int> V(int ms,int v){ await Task.Delay(ms); return v; } int[] r = await Task.WhenAll(V(50,1), V(30,2), V(10,3)); Console.WriteLine(string.Join(",", r));

cards.prompt: sequential await after each start = 2x (no concurrency)
cards.code: using System; using System.Diagnostics; using System.Threading.Tasks; async Task<int> V(int ms){ await Task.Delay(ms); return ms; } var sw=Stopwatch.StartNew(); int a=await V(100); int b=await V(100); Console.Write(sw.ElapsedMilliseconds >= 190 ? "2x" : "1x");

cards.prompt: process as they complete: WhenAny loop returns in completion order
cards.code: using System; using System.Collections.Generic; using System.Linq; using System.Threading.Tasks; async Task<int> V(int ms,int v){ await Task.Delay(ms); return v; } var tasks = new List<Task<int>>{ V(30,1), V(10,2), V(20,3) }; var order = new List<int>(); while(tasks.Any()){ var done=await Task.WhenAny(tasks); tasks.Remove(done); order.Add(await done); } Console.WriteLine(string.Join(",", order));
